questions.question: What is the time complexity of the 'Find Peak Element' algorithm, which uses Binary Search to find the peak element in a sorted array?
questions.hint: The algorithm uses Binary Search, which divides the search space in half.

questions.question: Explain the difference between a Stack and a Queue in the context of Data Structures.
questions.hint: Think of a Stack as a Last-In-First-Out (LIFO) data structure and a Queue as a First-In-First-Out (FIFO) data structure.

questions.question: Write a Python code snippet to implement the 'Fibonacci' series using recursion, and explain its time complexity.
questions.hint: Use a recursive function to calculate the nth Fibonacci number.
